summary: The `agt report <feature>` command was already fully implemented in bin/lib/report.mjs with buildReport() and cmdReport() functions, dispatched from bin/agt.mjs. The command prints all required sections (header, task summary table, cost breakdown, blocked/failed tasks, recommendations) to stdout, with an optional --output md flag to write REPORT.md. All 539 tests pass (2 skipped).
